[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeFramebuffer](../../TextmodeFramebuffer.md) / textures

# Accessor: textures

## Get Signature

```ts
get textures(): WebGLTexture[];
```

The color attachment textures owned by this framebuffer.

### Returns

`WebGLTexture`[]
